categories.name: Logi Symphony
categories.description:
Logi Symphony is a BI and Analytics solution, designed for embedding analytics content into other applications.

Click on the link below to get you started with Logi Symphony.

categories.name: Logi Composer
categories.description:
Logi Composer is designed specifically for software teams, it delivers the first out of the box development experience for embedded analytics.

Click on the link below to get started with Logi Composer.

categories.name: Dundas BI
categories.description:
Dundas BI is a flexible, open, fully programmable data analytics platform enabling end-users and content creators to visual insights perfect for embedding and easily consumable for end-users.

Click on the link below to get you started with Dundas BI.

categories.name: Logi Report
categories.description:

Click on the link below to get started with Logi Report.

categories.name: Logi Info

categories.name: Izenda
categories.description:

categories.name: Exago
